hero.title: Uburyo bwo kubigeraho
hero.lead: IATF ifite intego yo gutuma uru rubuga rworoha, rusomeka, rushobora kugerwaho na clavier, kandi rushobora guhuza n'ikoranabuhanga rifasha.
support: Ku bijyanye no kugera ku mbuga za interineti, IATF ikoresha [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Uburyo bw'ingirakamaro bwo kugera ku bantu na bwo bushingiye ku byo abakoresha ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga by'ubufasha bahura na byo mu buryo butaziguye.

header.title: Gutanga raporo y'ikibazo cy'ubushobozi bwo kugera kuri mudasobwa

paragraphs: Niba ubonye inzitizi yo kugera kuri uru rubuga, nyamuneka ubimenyeshe kuri e-mail:
items: ikoranabuhanga ry'ubufasha, browser cyangwa igikoresho wakoreshaga, niba ari ngombwa
report.footnote: Si ngombwa ko wandika raporo y'ikosa ryemewe. Ibisobanuro bisobanutse birahagije.

paragraphs: Ibibazo byo kuboneka birashobora gukusanyirizwa mububiko rusange bwihariye kugirango bishobore gukosorwa muburyo bweruye. Ibiranga abantu ku giti cyabo n'amakuru y'ibanga adakenewe arakurwaho mbere yo gutangaza.
Niba raporo yawe ikubiyemo amakuru y'ibanga, ujye ubivuga neza mu butumwa.
Uru rubuga ni ruto kandi ahanini ruhagaze. Imirongo imwe n'imwe y'ururimi ishobora kuba itararangira mu gihe ubuhinduzi burimo gutegurwa.
